reviews.comment:
Excelente renovación, hacía falta...solo faltan que habiliten boxes para cambios de aceite y eso. Full con todos los servicios, el desayuno con palta y huevo lo mejor en precio calidad.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent renovation, much needed... all they need is to enable oil change bays and such. Fully equipped with all the amenities, the avocado and egg breakfast is the best value.

reviews.comment:

(Translated by Google)
